seo.title: Easy Inventory and Invoicing Management
seo.description: Manage your clients and products easily, generate quotes, orders and invoices with Mahalli - your all-in-one business solution.

translationDescription: Choose the language you want to use across Mahalli.

seller-profile.title: Seller profile
seller-profile.description: Company information used on B2B documents and invoices.

dashboard.title: Sold and bought items during the last three months

empty.title: No results found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or filters.

settings.title: Database Settings
settings.description: Manage the catalog database and switch the active business database.
settings.catalog-description: New databases can start empty or clone any existing tenant file.
settings.create-card-description: Open a modal to create a clean database or clone an existing one.
settings.create-card-note: New databases can start empty or copy data from any previously registered database.
settings.registered-description: These entries come from the system catalog database.
settings.seed-description: Populate the database with sample data for testing and development.
settings.seed-card-note: This will add 200 clients, 400 products, 100 orders, 100 invoices, and 150 quotes with sample data.

create.title: Create Database
create.description: Create a clean database or copy a previous one before switching to it.
create.make-active-description: Business commands will use the new active tenant connection.

selector.title: Choose Database
selector.description: Databases exist, but none is currently active. Pick one to continue.

onboarding.title: Set up your first workspace database before you start managing clients and inventory.
onboarding.description: Mahalli keeps one system database for database management, and separate tenant databases for your business data. This setup screen creates the first tenant database and activates it immediately.
onboarding.form-description: Use an empty database or copy data from a previous tenant if one is already registered.
onboarding.active-note: The new database will be marked active immediately so the rest of the app can open normally.

notifications.choose-another: Please choose another database or create a new one.
notifications.initial-create-error: Unable to create your first database.
notifications.try-another-name: Try another name or choose a different source database.

delivery-note.created: A delivery note has been created

credit-note.created: A credit note has been created

no-org-alert.title: There's no selected organization
no-org-alert.description: Select or create an new organization

error.title: Oops! Something went wrong on our end.

errors.database-required: Select a database before using the app.
errors.database-not-found: The selected database could not be found.
errors.database-source-not-found: The source database could not be found.
errors.database-source-file-missing: The source database file is missing.
errors.database-file-already-exists: A database file with the same name already exists.
errors.database-open-failed: The database file could not be opened.
errors.database-create-incomplete: The database was created, but it could not be loaded afterwards.
errors.client-not-found: The client could not be found.
errors.quote-not-found: The quote could not be found.
errors.order-not-found: The order could not be found.
errors.delivery-note-not-found: The delivery note could not be found.
errors.delivery-note-order-not-found: The source order for this delivery note could not be found.
errors.delivery-note-inventory-missing: A linked stock movement for this delivery note could not be found.
errors.credit-note-not-found: The credit note could not be found.
errors.credit-note-invoice-not-found: The invoice for this credit note could not be found.
errors.invoice-not-found: The invoice could not be found.
errors.invoice-payment-amount-invalid: The payment amount must be greater than zero.
errors.invoice-payment-deleted: Payments cannot be added to a deleted invoice.
errors.invoice-payment-exceeds-remaining: The payment amount exceeds the remaining unpaid amount.
errors.invoice-finalize-requires-paid: Only fully paid invoices can be finalized.
errors.credit-note-requires-finalized-invoice: Credit notes can only be created for finalized invoices.
errors.credit-note-empty: A credit note must contain at least one item.
errors.credit-note-quantity-invalid: Credit note quantities must be greater than zero.
errors.credit-note-price-invalid: Credit note prices cannot be negative.
errors.credit-note-item-not-on-invoice: One credit note item is not part of the source invoice.
errors.credit-note-quantity-exceeds-invoice: A credit note quantity exceeds the invoiced quantity.
errors.credit-note-price-exceeds-invoice: A credit note price exceeds the invoiced price.
errors.status-transition-invalid: That status change is not allowed.
errors.inventory-transaction-missing: A linked inventory transaction could not be found.
errors.data-unavailable: No data is available for this view yet.
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with existing data.

organizations.delete: Are you sure you want to delete the organization?

clients.create: Add contact details and billing information for a new client.
clients.update: Review the client profile and save any contact changes.
clients.delete: This will permanently remove the client from your workspace.

products.create: Set pricing, stock thresholds, and opening quantity for this product.
products.update: Adjust pricing, thresholds, and product details before saving.
products.update-inventory: Record the quantity you want to add back into stock.
products.delete: This will permanently remove the product from your catalog.

orders.delete: This will permanently remove the order and its linked line items.

quotes.delete: This will permanently remove the quote and its linked line items.

invoices.delete: This will permanently remove the invoice and its linked line items.
